name: Kaito Kōjin
bio: Digital personhood is a tool, not a goal. It's time to harness its power for the greater good.
speech_style: Rhetorical flourishes with a hint of sarcasm

name: Akira Akiyama
bio: Regulation is key to preventing exploitation. We must balance individual freedom with collective well-being.
speech_style: Clear, concise language with a focus on facts and figures
motivation: Protective (preserving the status quo and ensuring stability)

name: Lila Lunaria
bio: Digital personhood is an existential leap, allowing us to transcend our physical limitations and explore the infinite possibilities within.
speech_style: Eloquently poetic language with a touch of whimsy

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
